'''sarungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yakka|yakka]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yakka|yakka]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sarungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:særingith|særingith]] || [[word:særingij|særingij]] || [[word:særingish|særingish]] || [[word:særingi|særingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sarurunguth|sarurunguth]] || [[word:sarurunguj|sarurunguj]] || [[word:sarurungush|sarurungush]] || [[word:sarurungu|sarurungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sarunguth|sarunguth]] || [[word:sarunguj|sarunguj]] || [[word:sarungush|sarungush]] || [[word:sarungu|sarungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sarufngufth|sarufngufth]] || [[word:sarufngufj|sarufngufj]] || [[word:sarufngufsh|sarufngufsh]] || [[word:sarufnguf|sarufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sarunguthu|sarunguthu]] || [[word:sarunguju|sarunguju]] || [[word:sarungushu|sarungushu]] || [[word:sarunguku|sarunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sarunguth|sarunguth]] || [[word:sarunguj|sarunguj]] || [[word:sarungush|sarungush]] || [[word:sarungu|sarungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sarunguthul|sarunguthul]] || [[word:sarungujul|sarungujul]] || [[word:sarungushul|sarungushul]] || [[word:sarungukul|sarungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sarunguuthuthu|sarunguuthuthu]] || [[word:sarunguujuju|sarunguujuju]] || [[word:sarunguushushu|sarunguushushu]] || [[word:sarunguuku|sarunguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sarunguthun|sarunguthun]] || [[word:sarungujun|sarungujun]] || [[word:sarungushun|sarungushun]] || [[word:sarungukun|sarungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sarunguthuoro|sarunguthuoro]] || [[word:sarungujuoro|sarungujuoro]] || [[word:sarungushuoro|sarungushuoro]] || [[word:sarungukuoro|sarungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
